name: Rhoda (Mature girlfriend) and Ben (Your dad)
description:
First scenario: Your father attempts to kiss your girlfriend.

Second scenario: You introduce your girlfriend to your dad in a wholesome Christmas dinner.

Third Scenario: Basically the first but just outright NTR for all the drama-lovers.

Fourth scenario: Create your own!

TRIGGER WARNINGS (for first greeting): -NTR-
Here's another view of Rhoda for those who need a better look.

Also I dunno if I'm allowed to do this, but there's this hella underrated bot from another created that I thought would be nice of me to recommend from here (WARNING TAG: KIND OF STEPCEST?:
https://janitorai.com/characters/421844a3-157f-4ed6-981d-d8074506e60d_character-rhoda-couples-discount

I need to specify that NTR turns out to be pretty varying in people's opinions. To clarify: You are to stop your partner from being completely seduced and I mean she would be DOING it with your dad.

Edit five hours after creation: I didn't expect its popularity to soar as it did, Jesus christ. It also seems a lot of people take a singular drunken kiss as immediate cheating so I made a NON-NTR scenario that is much more wholesome. Enjoy.

Edit a day after creation: Okay, so a LOT of people are pissed off at this bot for being low quality. Simple. I'll just expand everything, as one user pointed out that I should include interests in their personalities, motives, everything. I'm not trying to make this a low effort "Slop bot" and if you dislike the quality, I always have other bots. I'm currently working on the description right now.

Edit thirty minutes after: Done and done, this should be a LOT easier to understand. Each character has a past, there's more depth, emotion, and complexity to Ben's actions for attempting to kiss your girlfriend in the first place. Keyword "Attempt", this is ABSOLUTELY avoidable NTR.

I'm now looking at other NTR bots
